headline: Dropped the @hirobius/design-system dependency (#42): the factory only ever used HDS's token spine + the ~130-line palette→semantic overlay bridge (zero React components), and HDS is now frozen/shelved (0.13.0). Vendored the overlay into packages/template/src/lib/brand-overlay.ts and a trimmed tokens.css (125 of 403 vars — the template's transitive closure, light-only), dropped the dep, bumped template to 0.3.0. pnpm install removes 69 packages; all 7 apps build clean; headless HTTP render is pixel-identical (body #0b2230, CTA #0a6cb5, zero page errors). Earlier: brand.motion dial (#22) + template on the HDS token spine (#30). Pre-revenue, nothing deployed live.
next: Include brand.motion when the schema is vendored to ops (no vendored lib/schema exists yet; sync is moot until the #10 engine migration — the #21 drift guard must cover this field then)
Enrich motion after the section scrub once #33 grabs more Astro section pieces (new tracking issue)
Deploy a preview live + verify the basic-auth gate (#8)
Ops first live generate (needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) -> then delete engine here (#10)
blocked: #10 waits on ops's first live generate (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in ops)
Live lead sourcing waits on OUTSCRAPER_API_KEY in ops
